name: GBT Technologies Inc.
business: GBT Technologies Inc. develops Internet of Things (IoT) and Artificial Intelligence (AI) enabled networking and tracking technologies, including wireless mesh network platforms, an intelligent human body vitals device, asset-tracking IoT, and an RF-based computer vision system. The company also provides IT consulting services and licenses its technology. Target markets include telecommunications providers, corporate entities, universities, and government entities.
sellsTo: corporate entities that run LAN or wide-area networks

exposures.sentence: The Company via its 50% subsidiary, is targeting growing markets such as development of Internet of Things (IoT) and Artificial Intelligence (AI) enabled networking and tracking technologies, including wireless mesh network technology platform and fixed solutions, development of an intelligent human body vitals device, asset-tracking IoT, and wireless mesh networks.
The Company s GopherInsight platform makes it easy to add and manage last mile capacity.

The Company via its 50% subsidiary, is targeting growing markets such as development of Internet of Things (IoT) and Artificial Intelligence (AI) enabled networking and tracking technologies, including wireless mesh network technology platform and fixed solutions, development of an intelligent human body vitals device, asset-tracking IoT, and wireless mesh networks.

an advanced RF-based computer vision system, to utilize this platform potential to significantly enhance object detection and imaging capabilities, using radio waves to create detailed 2D and 3D images.
a machine learning driven technology that controls radio wave transmissions, analyzes their reflections data, and constructs 2D/3D images of stationary and in motion objects
GBT was forced to make the decision of changing the Company s direction by developing a portfolio of intellectual property within the area of microchips technology and design.

the parties agreed to form a joint venture limited liability company in the State of Nevada (the JV LLC ) for the purpose of developing, commercializing, and managing designated electronic design automation (EDA), defense, and high-security technology projects (the Designated Projects).

catalysts.event: Merger closed converting VisionWave holdings into publicly traded VisionWave Holdings
catalysts.sentence: Said Merger was closed on July 14, 2025 and the Company holdings in Visionwave Technologies been converted into holdings in VisionWave Holdings, Inc publicly traded on NASDAQ under the Ticker VWAV.

catalysts.event: Entered into Strategic Joint Venture Agreement with BOCA JOM, LLC
catalysts.sentence: On January 9, 2026, VisionWave Holdings, Inc. ( VWAV ) entered into a Strategic Joint Venture Agreement (the Agreement ) with BOCA JOM, LLC ( BOCA ), GBT Tokenize Corp. ( TOKENIZE ), and GBT Technologies, Inc. ( GBT ).
